reference: Hi, my daughter is nine months old, and she has a fever of one hundred and two point three degrees Fahrenheit now. I gave her a suppository, but after fifteen minutes, she had a bowel movement, more like diarrhea, and the fever is not going down; it is actually going up. Can I give her Advil syrup if she had a suppository an hour ago?
text: Hi, my daughter is 9 months old, and she has a fever of 102.3 degrees Fahrenheit now. I gave her a suppository, but after 15 minutes, she had a bowel movement, more like diarrhea, and the fever is not going down. It is actually going up. Can I dip her Advil syrup if she had a suppository an hour ago?
